name: Son House
abstract: Edward James "Son" House Jr. (March 21, 1902 – October 19, 1988) was an American Delta blues singer and guitarist, noted for his highly emotional style of singing and slide guitar playing.

concerts.label: New York Folk Festival: The Evolution of Funk
Midnight Performance: New York Folk Festival: The Evolution of Funk

about_quotes.speaker: Clay Jenkins
about_quotes.evidence: And one of the things I went to was the Mississippi Delta guys, like Son House and Robert Johnson and those guys, and I really dove into that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Clay Jenkins interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, March 18, 2016
